top.title: Watch the moment Artemis II blasts into space
top.summary: After delays and technical issues, the first crewed Moon mission in 50 years finally took off from Florida and is now in Earth's orbit.

top.title: Trump leaves key questions unanswered as he seeks to calm nerves over Iran war
top.summary: There were some glaring omissions in the president's primetime address, writes the BBC's Gary O'Donoghue.

top.title: Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits off Indonesia, killing one
top.summary: The quake struck between the islands of Manado and Ternate. Tsunami warnings have now been lifted.

top.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX set to go public in $1 trillion share listing
top.summary: The company’s public stock debut is set to be one of the most valuable in history, and could make Musk the world's first trillionaire.

top.title: Peppa Pig and Transformers owner Hasbro hit by cyber-attack
top.summary: The firm says its operations remain open but says the hack "may result in some delays".

top.title: Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected'
top.summary: Anthropic, the company behind the AI coding assistant, said it was fixing a problem blocking users.
